verdict: PASS — ready to share with Apex. v0.9.5 reverts a category error introduced in v0.9.4: the AJIO × JCP test-automation claim belongs to Ratl, not Boltic. The home register's 'Boltic + Ratl · AI-first testing' line conflates the two; Ratl is the testing platform, Boltic is the workflow-automation OS that may orchestrate around it but does not itself run the 1,300 test cases. Honest position restored: Boltic = Live · Platform (Fynd internal); Boltic-for-RR = Building (no Live RR deployment of Boltic alone documented in source).

correction_summary.what_was_wrong: v0.9.4 added a §03 'Live for Reliance Retail · AJIO × JCP' section with two `Live · RR` cards attributing the AJIO×JCP test estate to Boltic. This was a category error — Ratl owns AI-first testing; Boltic owns workflow automation. Source material does not document a Boltic-only Live RR deployment.
correction_summary.category_error_origin: v0.1 audit C1 finding interpreted the home page's 'Boltic + Ratl. AI-first testing...' as joint Boltic+Ratl evidence and surfaced it on /boltic. The correct surfacing is on /ratl, not /boltic.
what_was_reverted: Removed §03 'Live for Reliance Retail · what runs on AJIO × JCP' and both Live · RR cards (AI-first testing 1,300 cases, vibe-coded prototypes inside JCP)
Hero stat tile 4 reverted: 'Live RR estate · AJIO × JCP · 1,300 test cases' → 'Deployment · Cloud or your-cloud · Boltic-managed or Reliance-cloud self-host'
Hero section-label reverted: '...Live on AJIO × JCP · Next RR beachhead in build' → '...Platform live on Fynd · Reliance Retail deployment scoped'
Hero subhead 1 rewritten to surface only Boltic-specific platform telemetry: '198 workflows · 1.79M monthly executions on the live console' (sourced from slide 27 screenshot)
§02 module strip intro: dropped 'and on the AJIO × JCP test estate' → 'running on Fynd's own instance'
§03 (was §04) Boltic-for-Retail intro: dropped 'Beyond the AJIO × JCP test estate' → 'Three pillars where Boltic is being scoped...'
§03 capability pillar pills: 'Building · For RR' → 'Building · For RIL' (restored to canonical naming used elsewhere on register)
§04 (was §05) Inside Boltic intro: dropped 'and the AJIO × JCP test estate' → 'as it runs Fynd's own operations'
§05 (was §06) In-flight intro: dropped 'Beyond AJIO × JCP, three deployment threads' → 'Three deployment threads being scoped for the first Reliance Retail beachheads'

source_traceability.note: Slight drop because the §05 caption no longer carries the 198/1.79M claim with explicit deck-slide-27 attribution — both still cited in hero source line

honesty_register.note: Honesty register IMPROVED — removing the false `Live · RR` Boltic claim is the correct register move. Page no longer overclaims by attributing Ratl's deployment to Boltic.

cross_page_consistency.note: Catalog still cites Live · 463M+ runs for Boltic — that figure remains unverified against source. Acceptable but flagged.

remaining_findings.issue: Catalog (catalog/index.html:244, 363) cites 'Live · 463M+ runs · 500+ integrations' for Boltic. The 463M+ figure is not in the source compilation folder and is not surfaced on /boltic. Either the catalog has an unsourced number, or /boltic should add it with citation.
remaining_findings.fix: Verify the 463M+ figure with the Boltic team. If real and citable, add to a hero stat tile with a Source line. If unverified, soften the catalog row.

remaining_findings.issue: The AJIO × JCP test-automation evidence (1,300 cases) and vibe-coded prototypes inside JCP belong on /ratl, not /boltic. Currently the home register surfaces the joint 'Boltic + Ratl' framing in one card; /ratl page should be checked to ensure it carries this Live · RR evidence.
remaining_findings.fix: Audit /ratl separately to confirm it surfaces the AJIO × JCP test-automation Live evidence with appropriate pills + sources. Out of scope for this Boltic audit.

strengths: Honest register: page no longer claims Live RR Boltic deployments without source. Boltic = Live · Platform; Boltic-for-RR = Building.
Hero leads with a sourced Boltic-specific stat (198 workflows · 1.79M monthly executions, Sep-2025 sample from slide 27 screenshot) instead of a positioning claim.
Section labels contiguous §01 → §07; clean update from the v0.9.4 §01 → §08 numbering.
Tone-of-voice fixes from v0.9.4 all preserved: no `today`, `production operations`, `right now`, `from day one`, `earns its rent`, `ready for` constructions remain.
Inline source citations in hero, §02, §03 intros all retained; §05 Workflow Analytics caption still date-binds the screenshot to Sep-2025.
Reliance-only filter still applied: third-party customer logos, brand testimonials, brand-named workflow screenshots all remain skipped per spec D4.
